name: Chili Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the yellow squash in water until tender, then drain and set aside.
2. In a sauté pan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and green chilies. Cook until the onions are translucent and the chilies are heated through.
3. Layer the cooked squash, sautéed onions, and grated cheese alternately in a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle the crushed crackers evenly over the top of the layers.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for about 30 minutes or until bubbly throughout.
(144 calories per serving) 1 serving=1 1/2 Vegetable exchanges 1/2 Bread exchange 1/2 Lean Meat exchange 1 Fat exchange
